backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the full-screen welcome gate feature to its relevant source files, UI components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point defining Tailwind directives and CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Google Fonts (Dancing Script, Playfair Display, EB Garamond) and mounts the React app with the title 'For My Cutee ✨'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that conditionally renders WelcomeGate or LoveLetterPage based on a boolean 'entered' state toggled by the gate's onEnter callback.
frontend/src/components/EntryButton.tsx: Empty file reserved for an entry button component.
frontend/src/components/Envelope.tsx: Empty file reserved for an envelope component.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHearts.t: Empty file reserved for the floating hearts background component.
Empty file reserved for the greeting message component.
frontend/src/components/HeartCanvas.tsx: Empty file reserved for the animated heart canvas component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Empty file reserved for the layout wrapper component.
Empty file reserved for the letter container component.
frontend/src/components/LetterContent.ts: Empty file reserved for the letter content component.
frontend/src/components/LoveLetterPage.t: Main love letter page component rendering a dark romantic background with floating emojis, a parchment-styled letter container with body text addressed to Priya, a wax seal, and a caffeine.ai attribution footer.
frontend/src/components/MusicControl.tsx: Empty file reserved for the music control component.
frontend/src/components/ReplayButton.tsx: Empty file reserved for the replay button component.
frontend/src/components/SealButton.tsx: Empty file reserved for the seal button component.
frontend/src/components/StarBackground.t: Empty file reserved for the star background component.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeGate.tsx: Full-screen welcome gate component that displays floating emoji particles, decorative ornaments, and a 'Welcome Cutee' button; triggers a fade-out animation before calling onEnter to reveal the main content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor or identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: Empty file reserved for the background music custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartAnimation.ts: Empty file reserved for the heart animation custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module reserved for future React Query hooks; currently exports nothing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind directives, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a dark romantic theme, and defines keyframe animations including float, fadeIn, accordion, and welcome gate transitions with overlay styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH CSS variable-based colors, custom fonts (EB Garamond, Dancing Script, Playfair Display), gold/maroon brand colors, custom shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a romantic 'For My Cutee' website with a full-screen welcome gate feature (clicking 'Welcome Cutee' button reveals the main LoveLetterPage), tracking existing and pending feature requests.
